summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PRs. No GitHub mutations are allowed by mode or job frontmatter; merge recommendations are blocked where complete merge preflight is missing or checks/review-bot proof is incomplete.

actions.reason: Useful, narrow PR but not merge-ready; maintainer-can-modify is true, so a repair pass should refresh proof, resolve bot findings, and rerun review/validation before any merge recommendation.
This may be mergeable after maintainer review, but the required merge preflight is incomplete in the artifact; human/maintainer confirmation is needed rather than emitting merge_candidate.
Useful narrow PR but not merge-ready; maintainer-can-modify is true, so repair should refresh proof and run required review/validation.
The PR looks promising, but merge preflight is incomplete and the branch is not maintainer-editable; maintainer judgment is needed before merge or replacement.
Broad PR with failing checks and explicit broad-code-delta human gate; do not emit merge or automated fix artifact from this cluster.
